2026-07-07PMOBuild Canada Homes ActOrder Designating the Minister of Infrastructure and Communities to Be the Minister for the Purposes of the Build Canada Homes ActOrder designating the Minister of Infrastructure and Communities, a member of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, to be the Minister for the purposes of that Act.N/A
subject: Order Designating the Minister of Infrastructure and Communities to Be the Minister for the Purposes of the Build Canada Homes Act
precis: Order designating the Minister of Infrastructure and Communities, a member of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, to be the Minister for the purposes of that Act.
